name: Building RAG Pipelines: From Embeddings to Production
description: A hands-on workshop where attendees build a retrieval-augmented generation pipeline from scratch — covering document chunking, vector storage, retrieval strategies, and integrating with LLMs for grounded answers.
targetAudience: Intermediate developers familiar with Python and LLM APIs who want to build production-ready RAG systems
prerequisites: Basic understanding of LLMs and APIs
